description: Babysitter plugin hooks for Gemini CLI — session initialization and AfterAgent continuation loop (proxied via a5c-hooks-proxy)

hooks.name: babysitter-proxied-session-start
hooks.description: Initializes a Babysitter session state file so the AfterAgent hook can track orchestration progress (proxied via a5c-hooks-proxy)

hooks.name: babysitter-proxied-after-agent
hooks.description: Babysitter orchestration loop driver — blocks session exit to continue iterating until the run is complete (proxied via a5c-hooks-proxy)
